meta.title: Privacy Policy — kalandra.tech
meta.description: Privacy policy for kalandra.tech — how we collect, use, and protect your data.

heading: Privacy Policy
intro: This privacy policy explains how kalandra.tech ("we", "us", "our") handles your personal information.

sections.title: What We Collect and Why
sections.content: We collect only what you provide through forms (account registration, profile updates, job offers, comments) and use it to operate the platform. Additionally, third-party services we rely on may collect technical data automatically:
items: Authentication — our auth provider stores your email, password hash, and OAuth tokens. Passwords are never stored in plain text.
Observability — error tracking, analytics, and monitoring tools may collect your IP address, browser type, and interaction data.
Cookies and local storage — used for your authentication session and preferences (dark mode, language). We do not use advertising cookies.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your data. Third-party service providers receive data solely for operating and improving the platform.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: This platform exists for submitting and discussing job offers. Job offers you submit — including the contact information attached to them — and any comments are retained permanently as essential business records and cannot be deleted. You can request deletion of your account and profile picture by contacting us at pavel@kalandra.tech.

sections.title: Your Rights
items: Access the personal data we hold about you via your Profile page
Request deletion of your account and profile picture by emailing pavel@kalandra.tech

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at pavel@kalandra.tech.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
